mapper.select: SELECT * FROM prd_requisition_detail WHERE requisition_id = #{reqId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY line_no

SELECT d.* FROM prd_requisition_detail d JOIN prd_requisition r ON r.id = d.requisition_id WHERE r.prd_order_id = #{orderId} AND r.deleted = 0 AND d.deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.bill_date ASC, r.id ASC, d.line_no ASC
